creator: hardy.schumacher@gmx.de
text:
Created attachment 153313
Console log from building [ports-mgmt/portupgrade]

I deinstalled packages lang/ruby21, databases/ruby-bdb, ports-mgmt/portupgrade and changed /etc/make.conf by adding DEFAULT_VERSIONS= ruby=2.2.
Then I tried to reinstall ports-mgmt/portupgrade. 
Port lang/ruby22 is building, but port databases/ruby-bdb throws errors.
See attached logfile with console output.
